mapper.select: select u.id,u.username,u.another_name,u.picture,i.user_id,i.total_integral from user u left join integral i on u.id = i.user_id where u.user_status = '1' order by ifnull(i.total_integral,0) desc, u.id asc limit #{index},#{pageSize};

select u.id,u.username,u.another_name,u.picture,e.total_experience from user u left join experience e on u.id=e.user_id where u.user_status = '1' order by ifnull(e.total_experience,0) desc, u.id asc limit #{index},#{pageSize};

select pl.plate_name,p.title,p.post_author,p.publish_time,p.reply_count,p.id from post p join plate pl on pl.id =p.plate_id where p.post_status not in ('0','6') order by p.reply_count desc,p.id desc limit #{index},#{pageSize};

select pl.plate_name,p.title,p.post_author,p.publish_time,p.browse_count,p.id from post p join plate pl on pl.id =p.plate_id where p.post_status not in ('0','6') order by p.browse_count desc,p.id desc limit #{index},#{pageSize};

select pl.plate_name,p.title,p.post_author,p.publish_time,p.post_collect,p.id from post p join plate pl on pl.id =p.plate_id where p.post_status not in ('0','6') order by cast(ifnull(p.post_collect,'0') as unsigned) desc,p.id desc limit #{index},#{pageSize};

select pl.plate_name,p.title,p.post_author,p.publish_time,p.share_count,p.id from post p join plate pl on pl.id =p.plate_id where p.post_status not in ('0','6') order by p.share_count desc,p.id desc limit #{index},#{pageSize};

select pl.plate_name,p.title,p.post_author,p.publish_time,p.post_heat,p.id from post p join plate pl on pl.id =p.plate_id where p.post_status not in ('0','6') order by p.post_heat desc,p.id desc limit #{index},#{pageSize};
select id,plate_name,theme from plate order by theme desc limit #{index},#{pageSize};
select id,plate_name,posts from plate order by posts desc limit #{index},#{pageSize};

select count(p.id) as posts, u.id,u.username,u.another_name,u.picture from user u left join post p on u.id =p.user_id and p.post_status not in ('0','6') where u.user_status = '1' group by u.id,u.username,u.another_name,u.picture order by posts desc,u.id asc limit #{index},#{pageSize};
select count(*) as log, u.another_name,u.picture,u.id from u_log l left join user u on l.u_id =u.id group by u_id order by log desc limit #{index},#{pageSize};
select count(*) as todayTotalTheme from post where plate_id=#{id} and DATEDIFF(publish_time,NOW())=0
